growth_records.medium: Unamended 0.6 um-filtered natural seawater (dissolved organic matter), virus-reduced by dilution
growth_records.cite: Long et al. Benchmarking microbial growth rate predictions from metagenomes. ISME J (2021). DOI:10.1038/s41396-020-00773-1. [PMC7852909]
growth_records.snippet: Among Pelagibacterales, the highest observed growth rates ranged from 0.40 to 0.58 per day.
growth_records.notes: Observed max growth range 0.40-0.58 per day. Converted per-day to per-h by /24: max 0.58/24=0.02417 h^-1 (recorded), min 0.40/24=0.01667 h^-1. Doubling time = ln2/0.02417 = 28.68 h. Consistent with previously published SAR11 rates 0.4-0.6 per day cited in the paper.
